scripts.reset: node -e "require('dotenv/config'); const {Pool}=require('pg'); new Pool({host:process.env.PGHOST,port:process.env.PGPORT,user:process.env.PGUSER,password:process.env.PGPASSWORD,database:process.env.PGDATABASE}).query('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS activity_logs,calls,tasks,clients,leads,companies,users; DROP TYPE IF EXISTS user_role').then(()=>console.log('Reset done')).catch(e=>console.error(e)).then(()=>process.exit())"
